editions.effect:
(2)**, Banish a Specter ally card from your graveyard:** **Recover 2** and CARDNAME gets +2 [POWER] until end of turn.

As long as %a player doesn't control% no player controls% an object named Vorpal Sword, prevent all damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME.
